messages.message: An interface declaring no members is equivalent to its supertype.

suggestions.desc: Replace empty interface with a type alias.

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

source:
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import { getOrders, Order } from '@/lib/db' import { FileText, ShoppingCart, DollarSign, TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react' export default function Dashboard() { const [orders, setOrders] = useState([]) const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalOrders: 0, revenue: 0 }) useEffect(() => { // Only load data if running inside Tauri (tauri-plugin-sql needs native backend) if (window.__TAURI_INTERNALS__) { getOrders().then(data => { setOrders(data) const revenue = data.reduce((sum, order) => sum + (order.price * order.quantity), 0) setStats({ totalOrders: data.length, revenue }) }).catch(console.error) } }, []) return (

Dashboard

Overview of your online retailer business.

Total Orders

{stats.totalOrders}

Total Revenue

${(stats.revenue).toLocaleString()}

Average Order

${stats.totalOrders > 0 ? (stats.revenue / stats.totalOrders).toFixed(2) : 0}

Growth

+12.5%

) }

source:
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import { getOrders, type Order } from '@/lib/db' import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow, } from '@/components/ui/table' import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Search, FileText } from 'lucide-react' import { generateInvoicePDF } from '@/lib/pdf' export default function History() { const [orders, setOrders] = useState([]) const [search, setSearch] = useState('') useEffect(() => { fetchOrders() }, []) const fetchOrders = (query = '') => { if (window.__TAURI_INTERNALS__) { getOrders(query).then(setOrders).catch(console.error) } else { // Mock data for web fallback setOrders([ { id: 1, order_id: '260406-015', customer_name: 'John Mock', phone: '1234', product: 'Demo', quantity: 1, price: 10, created_at: new Date().toISOString() } ]) } } const handleSearch = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => { const val = e.target.value setSearch(val) fetchOrders(val) } return (

Order History

View and manage all past orders.

Order ID Date Customer Phone Product Qty Price Actions {orders.length === 0 ? ( No orders found. ) : ( orders.map((order) => ( {order.order_id} {order.created_at ? new Date(order.created_at).toLocaleDateString() : ''} {order.customer_name} {order.phone} {order.product} {order.quantity} ${order.price.toFixed(2)} )) )}
) }
